Jetstream Training
🏠

VRBO

Platform
Page Progress'+getPagePct('vrbo')+'%

We manage four VRBO accounts, each for a different region. You will learn how to handle inquiries, process new bookings, and use the correct templates.

🇨🇦 Canada
🇺🇸 USA
🇪🇺 Europe
🇬🇧 UK

⚠️ VRBO Login Note

In the beginning, VRBO often does not let you log in and may give error messages. While learning, please try logging into each account a few times — eventually it will allow you in. Use the links and credentials found in 1Password.

NB:

This process is typically no longer manual — bookings are now usually handled automatically through JetChat, with the confirmation email sent directly to the guest. However, it is still important to understand the manual process in case a confirmation email is not successfully sent. It is also helpful to know how to log into the VRBO backend, how to locate a reservation, and how to send a message to a guest directly from within VRBO.

Follow these steps each time a new VRBO booking comes in. Screenshots show exactly what you should see at each stage. (This process should now be automatic, or can be completed through JetChat. This is primarily a visual reference to show how the process was previously completed, and how to log into the backend to message a guest if needed.)

1
Open VRBO and sign in

Go to vrbo.com, click Sign In in the top-right corner, then select "Sign in as an owner" from the dropdown.

2
Sign into the correct country account

Before logging in, check the currency on the Cirrus booking to identify the correct region (e.g. EUR = Europe, GBP = UK, CAD = Canada, USD = USA). Select the matching VRBO account (Canada / EU / UK / USA), then click Open.

3
Go to the Inbox and find the booking

Once in the Owner Dashboard, click Inbox in the left sidebar. A search bar will appear — paste the confirmation code from Cirrus to find the specific reservation quickly.

4
Review the reservation page

Open the booking to see the reservation details and message thread. You will see confirmation that the booking was accepted. Now you need to send a manual confirmation template to the guest.

5
Send the confirmation template

Click "Use template" at the bottom of the message thread. Select the correct template from the list (see the template guide below), then click Send. After sending, go back into Cirrus and remove the NEW tag.

6
Which template should you use?

V1 Properties: Check the currency on the Cirrus booking — if it is EUR, select the Booking Confirmed French template. For English-speaking countries (GBP, CAD, USD etc.), select the New Booking Confirmed template.

V2 Properties: Select the Exclusive Inventory template. Choose the correct language version for the property.

📋 Which Template to Use

V1 Properties
Choose based on currency
  • Currency is EUR → Select the Booking Confirmed French template
  • Currency is a non-EUR English country → Select the New Booking Confirmed template
V2 Properties
Exclusive inventory template
  • Select the Exclusive Inventory template
  • Choose the correct language version for the property

📋 SOP: How to Log Into the Backend of a VRBO Account

1
Identify the Country Associated with the VRBO Listing
Method A — Use the Listing Image
  • Click on the listing image in the message
  • Check the listing title — it usually includes the country or region name
Method B — Use the Reservation ID
  • Copy the Reservation ID
  • Paste into each VRBO backend to identify which account it belongs to
2
Access Dashboard
Click Respond to this Inquiry.
3
Use 1Password
Find the correct VRBO region (USA, Canada, UK, Europe), copy credentials, and log in.
4
Verify Login
Return to Front and re-open the inquiry to confirm you are logged in correctly.
📝 Notes
  • Refresh the page if login fails
  • If the account shows the wrong region, log out and use a different VRBO account
  • Always verify the reservation ID matches before sending any message

VRBO Quiz

Test your knowledge of VRBO procedures and processes.

1. You receive a VRBO inquiry without a Reservation ID. What is the correct method to identify the listing's country?
2. Which of the following is true about using Cirrus to identify the listing's country?
3. What is the correct first step to open the VRBO Owner Dashboard from a message in Front?
4. When retrieving credentials from 1Password, how do you know which VRBO account to use?
5. What should you do if login to VRBO is delayed or fails?
